title: Create War
description: Create an army, guns, extra weapons, airship, and so much more to take take over the villagers! (Not really)
body:
![Create War The Questline Update Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6167186407d121741c2348a1275e4979c99e483.png)
### Hey, hey, hey...
This modpack is still being worked on and has a ton of things to be worked on, along with the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/a7fZN654V3); please be patient. Also, i am running this solo, and with EOCs just around the corner, upadates wont as often.


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/412d880bffc195d1f0749272b8df38a24a64ff55_0.webp)

Create Army adds many new features, all centered around creating an army:

- The ability to hire villagers to fight for you.
- Loads of new weapons to attack with.
  - Yes, this includes guns.
- Transport your materials throught **your** using trains, and you can even style them to your hearts desire.
- Fly in custom built airships.
  - These can also be used, if done correctly, to bomb a location from the sky.
- and so much MORE!
